How AirSafe Move Works

Four simple steps to find your ideal clean-air destination

01
👤

Enter Your Profile

Tell us about yourself - your current city, profession, age, and migration preferences.

▶
02
⚙️

Set Constraints

Define your maximum distance, budget, and food preferences for personalized filtering.

▶
03
✨

AI Analysis

Our ML model analyzes AQI data, costs, and career opportunities to score cities.

▶
04
📋

Get Report

Receive top 5 city recommendations with detailed migration readiness report.

Comprehensive Migration Intelligence

Our AI analyzes multiple factors to give you the most suitable city recommendations for a healthier, happier life.

📊

Real-time AQI Data

Access 5-year historical and current air quality data for 25+ Indian cities.

📍

Distance Optimization

Find the best cities within your preferred migration distance using Haversine formula.

💼

Profession Matching

Get recommendations based on job opportunities in your field across cities.

₹

Cost Analysis

Compare housing costs and find cities that match your budget requirements.

👥

Community Insights

Understand cultural compatibility and community profiles of recommended cities.

🤖

AI Advisory

Receive personalized migration advice with explainable AI recommendations.

🌬️
AirSafe Move

AI-powered migration advisory for healthier living

© AirSafe Move.
